name: Letter Sounds
description: Hear and identify individual letter sounds.
gameTagline: Watch two letters blend into a whole word.

name: Blend Recognition
description: Recognise how two letter sounds blend together.
gameTagline: Spin to land on a blend, then find a matching word.

name: Word Family Practice
gameTagline: Tap letters into place to spell the word.

name: Picture Matching
description: Match spoken and written words to pictures.
gameTagline: Match the picture to the word.

name: Independent Reading
description: Read whole words independently, without picture support.
gameTagline: Read the word, then find its picture.

name: Word Family Flash Cards
description: See a picture and its word family, then pick the blend that completes it.
gameTagline: Pick the blend that completes the picture.
